positive: A stylized, whimsical portrait of a friendly fox sitting at a picnic table, surrounded by floating floral arrangements and glowing fairy lights. The fox has a confident, gentle expression and is drawn in a detailed, hand-drawn illustration style with strong linework, evoking a vintage storybook aesthetic. The composition is highly symmetrical and centrally focused, with the fox as the main subject. Use limited, harmonious color palette focusing on deep forest greens, burnt orange, creamy ivory, and accents of glowing teal. The style should be highly contrastive, perfect for screen printing on natural fabric. Flat vectors, digital ink on canvas, storybook art, maximalism, clean silhouette, high contrast, no gradient shading.
negative: blurry, poorly drawn, mutated, artifacts, noise, text, watermark, signature, logo, poor anatomy, extra limbs, copyright, low detail, photographic, realistic
